title: Supremacy: World War 3
notes: This update delivers a range of quality of life improvements, gameplay balance adjustments, and bug fixes across Mobile and the Modern Client. Highlights include Tank Destroyer doctrine updates, mobilization balance changes, new accessibility options, and fixes for aircraft, missiles, Intelligence Agents, and several interface issues.
